description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body and a long, straight tail. Its plumage is predominantly dark gray to black, with lighter gray mottling along the wings and back, and subtle brownish hues near the head. The beak is short, slightly curved, and pale in color, contrasting with the darker feathers. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail is slender and tapers to a subtle point. The overall form is sleek and aerodynamic, suggesting a bird adapted for agile flight in urban or park environments.
description: A sleek, dark gray bird with a long, straight tail and mottled lighter markings on its wings and back. It has a short, pale, slightly curved beak and a streamlined body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, long tail, and mottled gray wing pattern.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the narrow tail and the lighter mottling on the back and wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bird's streamlined profile and subtle color gradients.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the bird's head, short pale beak, and the symmetry of its folded wings.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Mottled gray and brown with lighter patches on wings and back, solid darker head and tail
